outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: What we know on the 21st day of the US and Israel's war with Iran
outlets.summary: F-35 damaged by Iranian fire, IRGC spokesman killed, Caspian strikes, $200B Pentagon request, 2,200+ killed across region.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Pentagon asks for $200B as Israel hits Iran's biggest gas field
outlets.summary: South Pars strike, Netanyahu agrees to halt, Trump threatens 'massive' retaliation if Qatar hit again.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Pentagon sends White House $200 billion request for Iran war
outlets.summary: Unprecedented war spending request. First 12 days cost $16.5B. GOP divisions on funding.

outlets.name: Foreign Policy
outlets.headline: Gabbard reveals Iran was not rebuilding enrichment before war
outlets.summary: DNI testimony undercuts Trump's primary casus belli. Joe Kent resigns NCTC.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: America is winning in Iran — but without a clear strategy, real victory will slip away
outlets.summary: Opinion: Military success but no defined endgame. Calls for clearer strategic objectives.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iran executes 19-year-old champion wrestler for protesting regime
outlets.summary: Saleh Mohammadi executed. Regime intensifying crackdown during war.

outlets.name: Washington Examiner
outlets.headline: US deploys thousands more Marines to Middle East
outlets.summary: USS Boxer ARG with 11th MEU deploys ahead of schedule. ~4,000 personnel with F-35s.

outlets.name: Fox Business
outlets.headline: Bessent rules out government intervention in oil futures market
outlets.summary: Treasury Secretary won't intervene in oil markets. May unsanction 140M barrels Iranian oil.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Tehran warns of 'zero restraint' if energy sites targeted again
outlets.summary: IRGC spokesman killed. Israel strikes Tehran on Nowruz. Iran hits Gulf energy targets.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: 100 million views on AI-generated fake war videos
outlets.summary: BBC Verify: massive AI disinformation campaign. 110+ unique deepfakes identified.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: European Council calls for moratorium on energy strikes, Hormuz reopening
outlets.summary: 27 EU heads of state issue conclusions. ECB warns of inflation impact.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Israel strikes Tehran as Iran targets energy infrastructure across Gulf
outlets.summary: Mojtaba Khamenei Nowruz statement. Kuwait, Saudi, UAE, Bahrain all hit.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Iran renews fire on Israel after brief lull, claims it can still produce missiles
outlets.summary: 150 hospitalized in past 24h. Total 4,099 since Feb 28. Netanyahu press conference.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: IDF launches wave of strikes against Iranian terror regime in Tehran
outlets.summary: Nowruz strikes on Tehran. IRGC spokesman killed. IDF intensifying campaign.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: USS Boxer with Marines, F-35s deploys to Middle East
outlets.summary: 11th MEU deployment. 4,000 personnel. Joins 50,000 US troops in region.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: European Council calls for moratorium on energy strikes
outlets.summary: EU demands de-escalation, Hormuz reopening. 6-nation Hormuz coalition forming.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera (Araghchi interview)
outlets.headline: 'This is America's war' — Iran's FM rejects ceasefire
outlets.summary: Araghchi: No ceasefire, no negotiations. Nuclear material 'under the rubbles.'

outlets.name: India TV News
outlets.headline: Iran confirms IRGC spokesperson killed in US-Israeli missile attack
outlets.summary: Gen. Naeini killed in overnight strike. IRGC calls it 'criminal cowardly terrorist attack.'

outlets.name: Turkiye Today
outlets.headline: IRGC spokesman killed in US-Israeli strike on Tehran
outlets.summary: 4th senior Iranian official killed this week. Naeini was IRGC's top psyops specialist.

outlets.name: Time
outlets.headline: Iran warns against ceasefire as US strikes continue
outlets.summary: Araghchi: 'bitter experience' of US attacking during negotiations. Won't repeat.
